'''vavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:graphophonically|graphophonically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graphophonically|graphophonically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vavate|vavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vavatesher|vavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavatesherĂ«m|vavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vavatero|vavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vavateshĂ«|vavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavateshĂ«m|vavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivavatero|gokivavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivavateshĂ«|gokivavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivavateshĂ«m|gokivavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govavankerom|govavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govavankeshĂ«|govavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govavankeshĂ«m|govavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govavankeya|govavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vavaterom|vavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavatemu|vavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vavateya|vavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivavaterom|gokivavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivavatemu|gokivavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivavateya|gokivavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vavavate|vavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vavavatesher|vavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavavatesherĂ«m|vavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vavavatero|vavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vavavateshĂ«|vavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavavateshĂ«m|vavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivavavatero|gokivavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivavavateshĂ«|gokivavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivavavateshĂ«m|gokivavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govavavankerom|govavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govavavankeshĂ«|govavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govavavankeshĂ«m|govavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govavavankeya|govavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vavavaterom|vavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vavavatemu|vavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vavavateya|vavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivavavaterom|gokivavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivavavatemu|gokivavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivavavateya|gokivavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠte|vĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠtesher|vĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠtero|vĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠtero|gokivĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠvĂŠnkerom|govĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠvĂŠnkeya|govĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠterom|vĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠtemu|vĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠvĂŠteya|vĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠterom|gokivĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠvĂŠteya|gokivĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafvafte|vafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafvaftesher|vafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafvaftesherĂ«m|vafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafvaftero|vafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafvafteshĂ«|vafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafvafteshĂ«m|vafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafvaftero|gokivafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafvafteshĂ«|gokivafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafvafteshĂ«m|gokivafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafvafnkerom|govafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafvafnkeshĂ«|govafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafvafnkeshĂ«m|govafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafvafnkeya|govafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafvafterom|vafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafvaftemu|vafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafvafteya|vafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafvafterom|gokivafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafvaftemu|gokivafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafvafteya|gokivafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
